OpenAI aspired to agentic commerce — a bot spends your money for you.","score":0.81418616,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://streamlinefeed.co.ke/news/openai-abandons-video-ambitions-in-strategic-pivot-to-robotics","title":"OpenAI Abandons Video Ambitions in Strategic Pivot to Robotics","content":"OpenAI has discontinued its revolutionary Sora video-generation tool and terminated its partnership with Disney, signaling a major strategic","score":0.6964752,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.computerworld.com/article/4149925/openais-sora-exit-signals-enterprise-first-ai-shift.html","title":"OpenAI’s Sora exit signals enterprise-first AI shift – Computerworld","content":"# OpenAI’s Sora exit signals enterprise-first AI shift. OpenAI has discontinued its AI video generation platform Sora. The company announced the development in a sudden and unexpected post on X, stating that it was “saying goodbye” to the Sora app. However, it was only with the launch of Sora 2 and the standalone app in September 2025 that the video generator gained widespread traction. In December 2025, The Walt Disney Company announced plans for a $1 billion equity investment in OpenAI and to license characters from Disney, Star Wars, Pixar, and Marvel for the Sora AI video generator as part of a three-year partnership. With Sora now discontinued, the company said it will continue to focus on its roadmap to AGI and the compute needed to deliver agentic AI capabilities. The company said exiting Sora was part of a tradeoff in how it applies compute across research, product launches, and inference.","score":0.6628188,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/sectors/technology/articles/openai-ending-ai-video-feature-200003281.html","title":"OpenAI: Ending its AI video feature","content":"2. In a note to staff, OpenAI chief executive Sam Altman said the company "is focusing its efforts on AI agents and a new artificial intelligence model." The move coincides with "a push by OpenAI" to cut down expenses as it prepares to go public. "OpenAI retrenching to focus on things like its core product and AI robotics makes sense," said **Robin Wigglesworth** in the ***Financial Times***. AI video generation "gobbles up a vast amount of computing power"—by some estimates, a 10-second Sora video was 2,000 times more costly than an AI text output. That's "a problem until all of OpenAI's massive data centers are actually completed."
